question: What is the relative position of the surfboards in the image? Select from the following options: (A) the surfboards are positioned diagonally. (B) one surfboard is behind the other. (C) one surfboard is in front of the other. (D) one surfboard is next to the other.
gold_answer: one surfboard is next to the other
answer_choices: one surfboard is behind the other
one surfboard is in front of the other
one surfboard is next to the other
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
